privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Strikers Match ("we", "us", "our") operates the Strikers Match platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide during registration, including your full name, email address, phone number, date of birth, city, role (fighter, promoter, manager, or sponsor), and gym affiliation. Fighters may also provide physical attributes such as weight class, discipline, fight record, and profile photos. Promoters may provide event details including event names, dates, venues, and flyers.
privacy.section2Text: We use your information exclusively to operate the Strikers Match platform, including: creating and managing your account, enabling matchmaking between fighters and promoters, facilitating event registration and applications, displaying fighter profiles in the public directory (excluding private contact information), enabling in-platform communication between users, and processing minor consent forms when applicable.
privacy.section3Title: 3. We Do Not Sell Your Data
privacy.section3Text: We will never sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. Your data is used solely for the operation of the Strikers Match platform.
privacy.section4Text: Fighter contact information (phone number and email address) is strictly restricted to platform administrators. Promoters, managers, sponsors, and other users cannot access fighter contact details. All communication between users must occur through the platform's built-in systems.
privacy.section5Text: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard practices. Account data is managed through Supabase with Row Level Security (RLS) policies enforced at the database level. Uploaded files (photos, flyers, gallery images) are stored on DigitalOcean Spaces with access controls. We use HTTPS encryption for all data in transit.
privacy.section6Text: Users under 18 years of age require parental or legal guardian consent to use the platform. A digital consent form with a legally-binding signature is required before minors can access fighter profile features. Parent/guardian information is securely stored and accessible only to the minor and platform administrators.
privacy.section7Text: You have the right to access, update, or request deletion of your personal data by contacting us. You may update your profile information at any time through your account settings.
privacy.section8Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of any material changes via the platform.
privacy.section9Text: For questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@strikersmatch.com.
privacy.section10Text: We use cookies and browser local storage to remember your language preference and to keep your session active while you are logged in. We do not use cookies for advertising or third-party tracking. By continuing to use the platform, you consent to our use of these essential cookies.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By accessing or using the Strikers Match platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
terms.section1Text: Strikers Match is a platform that connects fighters, promoters, managers, and sponsors for combat sports events in Mexico. The platform provides tools for event management, fighter matchmaking, event registration, and in-platform communication.
terms.section2Text: Users must register with accurate information and select one of the available roles: fighter, promoter, manager, or sponsor. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Administrative accounts are reserved for platform operators.
terms.section3Title: 3. Assumption of Risk and Liability Disclaimer
terms.section3Text: COMBAT SPORTS INVOLVE INHERENT RISKS OF SERIOUS PHYSICAL INJURY, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO: FRACTURES, CONCUSSIONS, SPRAINS, CONTUSIONS, AND OTHER INJURIES THAT MAY RESULT IN TEMPORARY OR PERMANENT DISABILITY, OR IN EXTREME CASES, DEATH. By using this platform, you acknowledge and accept these risks.
terms.section3Sub1: Strikers Match is a technology platform that facilitates connections between fighters, promoters, managers, and sponsors. Strikers Match is NOT an event organizer, promoter, trainer, or sanctioning body.
terms.section3Sub2: Strikers Match bears no responsibility for any injuries, damages, losses, or death suffered by any user (including fighters, promoters, managers, sponsors, or spectators) arising from matches, events, training, or any activities arranged, organized, or facilitated through the platform.
terms.section3Sub3: This disclaimer applies regardless of whether the match or event was created by a promoter, applied for by a fighter, arranged by a manager, sponsored by a sponsor, or recommended through the platform's matchmaking system.
terms.section3Sub4: Each user is solely responsible for ensuring their own physical fitness, medical clearance, proper insurance coverage, and compliance with all applicable local, state, and federal laws and athletic commission regulations.
terms.section4Text: All communication between users must occur through the platform. Sharing, soliciting, or using contact information obtained through the platform for purposes outside the platform is prohibited.
terms.section5Text: Users under the age of 18 must obtain verifiable parental or legal guardian consent before using the platform. The parent or legal guardian assumes full responsibility for the minor's participation in any events or activities arranged through the platform.
terms.section6Text: Users may not: provide false or misleading information, attempt to contact fighters outside the platform to circumvent platform fees, upload inappropriate or illegal content, interfere with the platform's security or operation, or use the platform for any unlawful purpose.
terms.section7Text: All content, design, and technology of the Strikers Match platform are the property of Strikers Match. User-uploaded content (photos, flyers) remains the property of the respective users, but by uploading, users grant Strikers Match a non-exclusive license to display such content on the platform.
terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these Terms, engages in prohibited conduct, or at our sole discretion. Banned users will lose access to all platform features.
terms.section9Text: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, STRIKERS MATCH SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE PLATFORM, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO PHYSICAL INJURIES, PROPERTY DAMAGE, LOSS OF REVENUE, OR LOSS OF DATA.
terms.section10Text: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Mexico. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Mexico.
terms.section11Text: We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.section12Text: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at info@strikersmatch.com.

register.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, and cookies

cookies.bannerText: We use cookies and local storage to keep you logged in and remember your language preference. We do not use cookies for advertising or tracking.
